system.description: A god of the ocean, in its stillness and its rage.
system.title: God of the Ocean

scriptures.name: Level 1: The Drowning
scriptures.description: Ranged attack, single target, medium range. Fill the target's lungs with water. This spell can hit as many targets as you have levels in this god.

specials.name: Bypass Guard, 2 Disadvantages next turn
specials.description: If target needs to breathe air

scriptures.name: Level 2: Scale Armour
scriptures.description: Summon the fish-scale armour of the knight of the sea. Remains until dawn; dismissing early gains 1 God Debt. Roll Wis pool; for every success, pick: If Defence is 0, increase to 1. Survive/walk on water. Attacks gain Special: electrocute (1 Disadvantage). Or pitch a minor water ability to GM.

scriptures.name: Level 3: The Great Flood
scriptures.description: Waves crash in and water rapidly rises. On success, you walk on/through water freely; everyone else suffers 1 Disadvantage. Each turn choose: attack everyone with murderous fish, or attack single target with murderous fish.
